data.title: Industry group in Hong Kong supports OECD’s CARF and tax transparency but seeks lighter rules for recordkeeping.
data.description: The Hong Kong Securities & Futures Professionals Association supports the OECD's Common Reporting Standard and stricter tax transparency measures but is advocating for less stringent enforcement and a more adaptable approach to recordkeeping.

data.title: HyveGeo wins FoodTech Challenge for green desert initiative; 1 of 4 out of 1,200 entries from 113 countries.
data.description: HyveGeo has been announced as a winner of the FoodTech Challenge, a worldwide contest recognizing and amplifying the most innovative agri-tech solutions. The UAE-based startup secured its spot as one of four global champions, standing out from a pool of over 1,200 submissions spanning 113 nations. The final pitch to judges in Abu Dhabi was instrumental in determining the victorious participants.

data.title: Architecture giant Snohetta allegedly fired 8 employees for attempting to unionize, as per federal labor regulator.
data.description: According to a federal labor regulator, the company Snohetta terminated the employment of 8 workers in response to their efforts to form a union.

data.title: Billions are bet on prediction markets like Polymarket and Kalshi, on topics from Taylor Swift's wedding to elections.
data.description: On platforms like Polymarket and Kalshi, a significant amount of money, estimated to be in the billions of dollars, is being exchanged as individuals place bets on various events such as Taylor Swift’s wedding date and election results.

data.title: 'Immersive 'Phantom' version 'Masquerade' a crowd favorite, attracting fans with some returning over a dozen times.'
data.description: Since its debut last summer, the immersive rendition of Andrew Lloyd Webber's musical has been a huge success, attracting numerous repeat attendees with some individuals returning up to twelve times.

data.title: Bitcoin may face a 'liquidity grab' at $80K with tariffs hinting at local lows near $98K, 5 key points to note this week.
data.description: As Bitcoin approached its peak of $98,000, it was at risk of triggering a search for liquidity due to tariffs, potentially pushing its price back to lower levels.

data.title: TAGAT Foodtech launched on Jan 19, 2026, merging EDATA and SAG, offering solutions for animal protein supply chain.
data.description: On January 19, 2026, TAGAT Foodtech made its official debut in SÃO PAULO, marking the consolidation of a comprehensive range of solutions for the animal protein supply chain. This launch follows the announcement on June 12, 2025, of the strategic merger between EDATA and SAG. The integration aims to streamline operations and enhance efficiency.

data.title: Monero, Dash, and Dusk defy market sell-off with gains amidst rising demand for privacy coins amid crypto slump.
data.description: The category of privacy coins saw an increase in value during a period of market decline, with experts attributing this trend to a rising interest in "defensive" assets.

data.title: Kazakhstan restricts crypto trading to approved coins, central bank to oversee exchanges under new laws. President signed the law.
data.description: The President of Kazakhstan, Kassym-Jomart Tokayev, recently enacted legislation introducing licensed cryptocurrency exchanges in the country. These new laws also grant the central bank the power to authorize tradable cryptocurrencies. This move marks a significant step towards regulating the crypto market in Kazakhstan, providing clearer guidelines for the establishment and operation of exchanges.
